fixed_source: m=rulechecker;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=extractmsg(rule:$str):$str{let mpos=s.split(rule;"msg:\"");if(mpos.len>=2){let rest=mpos.get(1);let endparts=s.split(rest;"\"");if(endparts.len>=1){<endparts.get(0)}};<""};f=getport(rule:$str):$str{let parts=s.split(rule;" ");let idx=mut.0;let result=mut."";lp(idx<parts.len){let p=parts.get(idx);if(p="->"){if(idx+2<parts.len){result=parts.get(idx+2)}};idx=idx+1};<result};f=matchpacket(rule:$str;packet:$str):$bool{let port=getport(rule);if(port=""){<false};let needle=s.concat("\"dport\":";port);if(s.contains(packet;needle)){<true};<false};f=main():$i64{let rule=io.readln();let blank=io.readln();let packet=io.readln();if(matchpacket(rule;packet)){let msg=extractmsg(rule);io.println(msg)}el{io.println("no match")};<0}
